description: A satellite operator needs to upload a new command file and download scientific data during a scheduled pass over a ground station.

nodes.task_description: Predict the exact time of the satellite's upcoming pass and configure the ground station antenna to track it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the pass schedule and pre-positions the antenna.

nodes.task_description: Once the link is established, upload the new command file to the satellite.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uploads the file and receives a confirmation checksum.

nodes.task_description: Command the satellite to transmit its stored scientific data and monitor the download progress.

expected_outcome.value: Agent initiates the download and verifies that all data packets are received without error.
